blocks.body: Prepositions of Place helps you choose in, on, and at when you talk about space, surface, point, or location.

{"level":"A1-A2","intro":"Prepositions of place show where a person or thing is: inside something, on a surface, or at a particular point.","rules":[{"label":"In","color":"emerald","text":"Use in when you imagine space with borders or something inside it.","example":"in a room / in a box / in London"},{"label":"On","color":"blue","text":"Use on when the surface, line, or contact with it matters.","example":"on the table / on the wall / on the floor"},{"label":"At","color":"amber","text":"Use at when you see the place as a point, address, or event location.","example":"at the station / at the door / at school"}]}

blocks.heading: 1. Core idea and form
blocks.body:
For place, it is better not to translate word by word, but to picture the spatial idea.

  • in = inside an area or container: in the kitchen, in a taxi, in Poland.
  • on = on a surface, line, or something treated like a platform: on the desk, on the page, on the coast.
  • at = a point, address, meeting place, or function of the location: at the bus stop, at the entrance, at work.

The same place can be described in different ways depending on what you want to highlight.

blocks.heading: 2. Main uses and examples
blocks.body:
PrepositionMain ideaExample
ininside an area, building, city, or containerThe keys are in my bag.
onon a surface or lineYour phone is on the sofa.
atat a point, address, or event placeLet's meet at the cinema.

Transport has its own common patterns too: we often say on the bus or on the train, but in a car or in a taxi.

blocks.heading: 3. Common mistakes
blocks.body:
• Mistake: in the wall when something is hanging on the surface.
    Better: on the wall.
  • Mistake: in home.
    Better: at home.
  • Mistake: mixing up in the picture and on the picture.
    Better: in the picture for what is visible inside the image; on the picture is rarer and usually means physically on the photo.
  • Mistake: always saying in the bus.
    Better: in normal usage, on the bus.

blocks.heading: 4. Quick rule
blocks.body:
• In = inside.
  • On = surface or line.
  • At = point or function of a place.
  • Before choosing, ask yourself whether you see a container, a surface, or a point.
